title: Ruby Red Solid Tissue Paper Fan (40cm) 1 Piece - Hanging Decoration for Party & Event Decor
features: TISSUE PAPER FAN FOR IMPRESSIVE DECORATION: Make a bold statement at your next party or event with our ruby red solid tissue paper fan, perfect for adding depth and dimension to your décor; guests will be in awe of these eye-catching hanging decorations.

BOLD RUBY RED DESIGN: This 40cm tissue paper fan is designed in a rich, versatile ruby red color that works beautifully for special events, themed parties, or any occasion where you want to make a dramatic impression.

CONVENIENT 1-PIECE SET: Receive a hassle-free, ready-to-hang decoration with this single-piece package that effortlessly unfolds and easily hooks to your desired location; no need to buy multiple packs or spend hours assembling.

EASILY ADAPTABLE TO ANY PARTY THEME: Our issue paper fan is suitable for all occasions - birthday parties, weddings, baby showers, Halloween, Christmas, New Year's Eve events, or black-tie affairs and can be paired with other colors for a custom ensemble.

STURDY & REUSABLE: Crafted from durable tissue paper, this fan decoration is perfect for repeated use; simply fold it back after each event and store it until you're ready to captivate your guests with its chic design again.
description: Product Description Add more color to your party with our Ruby Red Tissue Paper Fan. 1 Tissue Paper Fan - 16". This product features a circle paper fan design made of ruby red colored tissue. This elegant tissue paper fan is perfect for weddings, events, banquets, and decoration for parties. This product is made of durable tissue paper, easy to assemble and use. Made with eco-friendly tissue paper that is disposable and biodegradable. Box Contains 1 x Paper Fan
